hero_subtitle: We bring your car back to life with professional detailing, polishing, and protection. Experience the finest car care in Tarneit, Melbourne. Guaranteed satisfaction.
services_subtitle: Click any service to learn more and book via WhatsApp.

services.title: Full Car Detailing
services.desc: Complete inside & out premium detailing. We meticulously clean, polish, and protect every surface — restoring your car to showroom condition.

services.title: Interior Deep Clean
services.desc: Deep seat shampooing, carpet extraction, stain removal, and leather conditioning. Your cabin will look, feel, and smell brand new.

services.title: Paint Protection
services.desc: Premium ceramic coating and paint protection film. Shield your car from UV rays, bird droppings, and minor scratches.

services.title: Stain Removal
services.desc: Specialized treatment for tough stains — coffee, wine, mud, oil, and more. Professional-grade products that won't damage your interior.

gallery_subtitle: See the quality of our work — every car tells a story of perfection.
contact_subtitle: Located in Tarneit, Melbourne. Open 24 hours — call or message us anytime!
footer_desc: Premium car detailing services in Melbourne. 5.0 ★ rated with hundreds of happy customers.
